大发长期有效回本技巧【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239061414_63866739<br>vk.com/topic-239100466_64201197<br>vk.com/topic-239056878_64370634<br>vk.com/topic-239079469_64639520<br>vk.com/topic-239100494_63866756<br>vk.com/topic-239043739_64639533<br>vk.com/topic-239100472_64480252<br>vk.com/topic-239100512_64480262<br>vk.com/topic-239026545_63783511<br>vk.com/topic-239100516_64201341<br>vk.com/topic-239100519_64639620<br>vk.com/topic-239100481_65519889<br>vk.com/topic-239100484_63866848<br>vk.com/topic-239100524_63866850<br>vk.com/topic-239100483_64056953<br>vk.com/topic-239100459_64639631<br>vk.com/topic-239100455_63783541<br>vk.com/topic-239100477_65315086<br>vk.com/topic-239092637_65315087<br>vk.com/topic-239100468_64370727<br>vk.com/topic-239100487_65315093<br>vk.com/topic-239100467_65315096<br>vk.com/topic-239100499_64639652<br>vk.com/topic-239100470_64942846<br>vk.com/topic-239100533_64056983<br>vk.com/topic-239100482_64480366<br>vk.com/topic-239100460_64942917<br>vk.com/topic-239100560_64942919<br>vk.com/topic-239100534_63866967<br>vk.com/topic-239100567_65315175<br>vk.com/topic-239100569_64639749<br>vk.com/topic-239100573_64057080<br>vk.com/topic-239056878_64370830<br>vk.com/to
